properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Though it seems I am oft unnoticed And lost in time and space God above is watching over me Though I cannot see His face.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Higher hands are leading me, are leading me Higher hands are leading me, I am not alone I know As I walk in this world below For higher hands are leading me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There’s a great eternal purpose In the life of everyone And some day we'll know its meaning When our life on earth is done.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: So I face an unknown future Full of faith and unafraid And the faith I have through trusting For the world I would not trade.
